name: Gf Gene's Basic Rice Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine buttermilk, melted butter, rice vinegar, and salt in the bread pan.
Stir with a rubber spatula.
2. In a large bowl, mix all dry ingredients (except yeast) well with a whisk.
3. In a separate bowl, beat eggs and water lightly.
4. Add half of the dry ingredients to the bread pan.
5. Pour in the egg mixture.
6. Sprinkle the remainder of the dry ingredients over the dough.
7. Sprinkle yeast on top.
8. Select Light Crust setting and press Start.
9. Observe the dough during kneading cycles; assist with a rubber spatula if needed.
10. After baking, remove bread from pan, place on wire rack, and let cool for 1 hour before slicing.
VARIATIONS
Substitute olive oil for butter.
Replace up to half of rice flour with other gluten-free flours like yellow or blue corn flour, polenta meal, or soy flour.
Add grated cheddar cheese for flavor.
Saute onions in melted butter, cool them, then add with herbs to make onion/herb bread.
